title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box
scenario: Onboarding EULA page requires License Agreement and Privacy Policy checkbox to be checked before Continue button becomes active
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. On the initial onboarding screen, observe the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box.
3. Tap the Continue button while the check box is unchecked.
4. Check the box for License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
5. Observe the Continue button state after checking the box.
expected: The Continue button should be inactive (grayed out) when the check box is unchecked. After checking the box, a checkmark appears and the Continue button becomes active (tappable). Tapping Continue proceeds to the next onboarding step.
